wnba_3pm.method: WNBA 3PM props using 3PA volume, shrinkage-adjusted 3P%, season/history profiles, L10 form, venue, opponent, injury, and consensus gates

wnba_player_props.method: Consensus-qualified player props using season, history, L10, and matchup signals as supporting inputs

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 60.2%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 59.9%; Over history hit rate 9-16 (56.2%)
